email_subject: Application for Recruiter role at ITZU Lommel
email_body:
Dear ITZU team,

I am writing to apply for the Recruiter position at your Lommel office, as advertised on VDAB. With a background in digital marketing and hands-on experience in candidate sourcing, client communication, and administrative follow-up, I am confident I can contribute to your Large Accounts team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage end-to-end processes: from research and outreach to tracking performance metrics. I actively use social media and job platforms to identify talent, and I am comfortable with phone-based sales and follow-up. My experience includes maintaining client relationships, coordinating with stakeholders, and handling administrative tasks such as contract extensions and document completion.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am proficient in MS Office and various analytics tools. I am organized, assertive, and thrive under pressure.

I would love to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear ITZU team,

I am excited to apply for the Recruiter role at your Lommel office. With a blend of digital marketing expertise and hands-on experience in candidate sourcing, client communication, and administrative coordination, I am well-prepared to support your Large Accounts team.

At Episto, I manage the full recruitment cycle for client projects: I proactively search for candidates via social media and job platforms, conduct phone screenings, and follow up throughout the process. I am comfortable with sales-oriented phone work and thrive on the energy of closing a successful placement. I also handle administrative tasks such as contract extensions, document completion, and maintaining KPI reports. My ability to work independently and organize daily tasks ensures efficiency even under time pressure.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am proficient in MS Office and experienced with analytics tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush, which I use to track performance and guide decisions. I stay updated on social legislation to provide accurate guidance to candidates.

Your offer of a competitive salary, meal vouchers, potential company car, and a dynamic work environment is very appealing. I am eager to bring my assertiveness, communication skills, and organizational talent to ITZU.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Proactively source candidates via social media and job platforms, with experience in phone-based sales and follow-up.
Manage end-to-end recruitment processes: from candidate outreach to contract administration and KPI tracking.
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.
Proficient in MS Office and analytics tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush) for performance reporting.
Organized, assertive, and able to work independently under time pressure.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

Core skills
- Candidate sourcing & recruitment: proactive search via social media and jobsites, phone screening, follow-up from A to Z
- Communication & sales: assertive phone communication, client relationship management, candidate satisfaction surveys
- Administration: contract extensions, social documents, KPI tracking, evaluation follow-up
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- MS Office: proficient in Word, Excel, Outlook
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration

Experience

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

Projects

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References
Available on request.
